mostInteresting.reason: Jupiter Lend has captured $75M+ of USDe deposits in their new Ethena Market, directly competing with Kamino's Ethena Market (which has $100M+). This represents aggressive competition for the same high-yield USDe liquidity pool that is core to both protocols' growth strategies on Solana. This is the most immediate competitive threat to Kamino's market position.
